command:
/bin/bash -lc "grep -RInE \"Task\\.(async|start)|spawn\\(|Port\\.open|System\\.cmd|mkfifo|sleep [0-9]|git push|open_port|start_link\" elixir/test --include='*.exs' | sed -n '1,1000p'
grep -RIn \"audit-volume\\|audit volume\\|volume\" elixir/test --include='*.exs'
sed -n '560,700p' elixir/lib/symphony_elixir/workspace.ex
sed -n '1,260p' elixir/test/test_helper.exs
sed -n '1,280p' elixir/test/support/test_support.exs"
